home.title: Whistleblower System
home.subtitle: Report concerns securely and confidentially
home.info_text: This reporting portal allows you to confidentially report misconduct. Your report will be handled in accordance with the German Whistleblower Protection Act (HinSchG) and the German Supply Chain Due Diligence Act (LkSG). You can report anonymously or by providing your identity. Your data is stored encrypted and only accessible to authorized personnel.

hinschg.title: Internal Reporting Channel (HinSchG)
hinschg.description: Report violations of applicable law within the organization. Protected under the Whistleblower Protection Act.

lksg.title: Public Complaints Channel (LkSG)
lksg.description: Report human rights violations or environmental misconduct in the supply chain. Publicly accessible under the Supply Chain Act.

home.mailbox_text: Access your secure mailbox to read messages, check the status of your report, or add new information.

wizard.title: Create Report
wizard.channel_hinschg_info: Report violations of applicable law within the organization.
wizard.channel_lksg_info: Report human rights violations or environmental misconduct in the supply chain.

validation.subject_max: The subject must not exceed 500 characters.
validation.description_max: The description must not exceed 50,000 characters.
validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.password_min: The password must be at least 10 characters long.
validation.password_max: The password must not exceed 128 characters.
validation.country_code: Please enter a valid 3-letter ISO country code.

fields.subject: Subject
fields.description_placeholder: Describe the incident in as much detail as possible...
fields.country_hint: 3-letter ISO country code (e.g., DEU, CHN, BRA)
fields.password_hint: Min. 10 characters. If left empty, a secure passphrase will be generated.

review.heading: Summary of your report
review.warning: Please review all information carefully. After submission, you will receive access credentials that you must keep safe. Without these credentials, you will not be able to access your mailbox.

upload.drag_or_click: Drag files here or click to select
upload.error_file_size: "{{name}}" exceeds the maximum file size of {{max}}.

submit.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

success.title: Report submitted successfully
success.subtitle: Your report has been securely transmitted and will be processed promptly.
success.no_data_text: This page can only be accessed after submitting a report.
success.warning_text: Please note or copy the following access credentials now. Without these credentials, you will no longer be able to access your secure mailbox. There is no way to recover lost credentials.
success.password_note: You have chosen your own password. Use it together with the case number to access your mailbox.
success.step_1: Store your credentials in a safe place.
success.step_2: Check your mailbox regularly for responses.
success.step_3: You will receive an acknowledgment of receipt within 7 days.
